text:
(In reply to Benjamin Kaduk from comment #1)
> "geli_swap_flags" is not mentioned anywhere related to rc.conf for stable/10
> or head; what release are you running?

True. AFAIK it was used in releng<10.0. In releng/10.0 it doesn't work anymore.
See https://forums.freebsd.org/viewtopic.php?f=48&t=46763
